title: Newborn Baby Gift Set – 4 Piece White Unisex Baby Gift Box with Bodysuit, Bib, Socks & Soft Toy – Newborn Essentials for Baby Shower Gifts, Gener Reveal Gifts, New Baby Gift Hamper (White 0-3 Months)

👶 Elegant Unisex Baby Gift Box Stylish and simple, this set is ideal for baby shower gifts, gender reveal gifts, or thoughtful new baby gifts for mum and dad.
. 🤍 Soft & Safe for Delicate Skin Crafted from gentle materials, this newborn gift set keeps baby cosy and comfortable during those precious first months.

description: Welcome a new baby into the world with this elegant Newborn Baby Gift Set in a beautiful white unisex design – perfect for those waiting for a surprise or seeking baby gifts newborn unisex. This classic 4-piece newborn essentials set includes a white bodysuit, matching bib, cosy socks, and a cuddly soft toy, all packaged in a luxury keepsake box. Whether you're shopping for baby shower gifts, a new born baby gift, or a thoughtful present for gender reveal gifts, this set is ready to impress. The minimalist style and gender-neutral colour scheme make this set suitable for both boys and girls, and ideal for parents who value timeless, high-quality newborn baby essentials. From first cuddles to first photos, this gift box brings warmth, comfort, and a touch of elegance – an ideal newborn gift, baby gift box, or new baby hamper that will be remembered and appreciated. Also available in blue for boys and pink for girls, so you can match your gift to any occasion or preference.
